name: Carlos Eduardo Gonzalez Henriquez
headline: Artificial Intelligence Engineer and Full Stack Developer focused on autonomous systems, LLM orchestration, computer vision, RAG, MCP, and React/Next.js product delivery.

education.institution: Universidad Nacional Experimental Maritima del Caribe

other_skills: Knowledge and studies in artificial intelligence since 2023.
DevSecOps certified with a focus on cybersecurity.
positioning: Combines AI engineering with product and full stack delivery instead of staying only at the model or research layer.
Comfortable translating operational domains like logistics, ports, telecom, legal operations, finance, and fitness into software products.
Has direct experience integrating AI systems with hardware-oriented environments in telecom and logistics, not only software-only workflows.
Recent GitHub activity across public and private repositories shows active work in Go, Gemini/Gemma integration, MCP servers, human handover dashboards, and modern Next.js 16 applications.
verified_highlights: Built G-Aereo, a logistics system that automated warehouse flows from import to export and billing at Gonavi.
Built port automation and anomaly-detection workflows with YOLOv11 and Python for container entries, exits, and monitoring.
Specialized in RAG architectures, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and computer vision model training.
Built enterprise RAG knowledge bases with embeddings and retrieval-augmented generation for corporate use cases.
Integrated SmartOLT, PostgreSQL, GLPI, MCP, and language models at Sisprot Global Fiber, reducing network fault identification time by 38%.
Migrated microservices and MCP servers from n8n to Bun and Hono at Sisprot Global Fiber, reducing response latency by 90% and automating 100% of initial ticket categorization and generation.
Built legal operations and financial admin modules at LegalContigo for a portfolio of more than 100 clients.
Built conversational UI flows for human handover support in React/Next.js and SPA environments.
Public repo GoDojo shows active work shipping a Go TUI with Gemma 4 via Gemini API, Bubbletea, testing, and hexagonal architecture.

Authenticated GitHub access verifies active private work on Next.js 16 and React 19 systems covering POS, finance, legal operations, MCP servers, support handover, and AI-assisted nutrition workflows.

experience.source: AI CV text provided by user on 2026-05-16
highlights: Trained and integrated real-time object detection models with YOLOv11 and Python for port automation, container entrance and exit control, and anomaly detection.
Built a robust enterprise knowledge base using embeddings and RAG to improve precision and relevance in corporate environments.
Applied fine-tuning techniques to OpenAI architectures to align responses with corporate identity and integrated multichannel capabilities with OpenAI and ElevenLabs.
Built a React/Next.js SPA conversational UI with chat-bubble interaction and human handover flows for support staff.
Worked on an experimental LLM plus MetaHuman avatar prototype in Unreal Engine with synchronized AI responses, real-time physics, and animations.

experience.source: Web CV text provided by user on 2026-05-16
highlights: Developed critical frontend and backend modules for G-Aereo, an air warehouse operating system covering import, export, and billing flows.
Developed critical frontend and backend modules for Stormy Vision, a port monitoring system covering container operations, visualization of arrivals and departures, and route tracking with maps.
Built responsive Next.js/React and Tailwind interfaces enriched with Framer Motion animations.

experience.source: AI CV text provided by user on 2026-05-16
highlights: Implemented an autonomous monitoring system for fiber infrastructure with SmartOLT and language models.
Automated diagnosis of OLTs, ONUs, and ODBs using MCP and context cache tools, reducing network fault identification time by 38%.
Architected a Level 1 support ecosystem connecting AI, PostgreSQL, and GLPI.
Designed and migrated MCP servers and microservices from n8n to Bun and Hono, reducing latency by 90% and automating 100% of initial ticket categorization and generation.

experience.source: Web CV text provided by user on 2026-05-16
highlights: Designed and implemented five independent role-based management modules for lawyers and administration.
Developed the financial ecosystem of the admin panel including invoicing, quotes, and payment method management.
Helped streamline operations for a portfolio of 100+ clients with scheduling, availability, and case lifecycle tooling.

experience.source: Web CV text provided by user on 2026-05-16
highlights: Built VE-Commerce, a multitenant POS and inventory system with multi-currency logic for USD, EUR, and BSD plus automated IGTF tax calculations using Next.js and Supabase.
Built Arepa Fit, an interactive nutrition platform focused on calorie counting, nutritional plan management, UX, and application state management.
Built conversational UI and payment portal flows in React/Next.js with human handover support.

public_projects.name: GoDojo

Readme shows explicit support for gemma-4-26b-a4b-it and gemma-4-31b-it.
Shows recent work on hexagonal architecture, testing, and agentic tutoring flows.

public_projects.name: Siberiano
highlights: Next.js TypeScript portfolio site with recent UI work, carousel interactions, and styling changes.
Demonstrates ongoing hands-on product and frontend work in modern web tooling.

public_projects.name: openai-devassistant
highlights: Earlier AI assistant project combining OpenAI, ElevenLabs, audio transcription, and a Gradio interface.
Shows a longer track record of working on multimodal and voice-enabled AI products.

guardrails: Use only facts supported by this dossier, the job page, or explicit runtime notes.

Do not claim relocation plans, visa status, salary preferences, or company-internal/private details beyond the verified high-level repository evidence captured here unless they are explicitly provided at runtime.
Do not overstate English beyond B2 or intermediate.
Do not invent metrics beyond the verified 38%, 90%, 100%, and 100+ client signals already included here.
Do not fabricate direct founder relationships, prior titles like Lead AI Engineer, or employer stack details that are not in evidence.
